Friendly. Local. For every pace.

Run Somerset
together.

A welcoming running club in the heart of the Somerset Levels. Whether it’s your first mile or your next marathon, there’s a place in the pack for you.

Come for a run ↗ Meet the club ↓

Scroll ↓

More than the miles

Your run.
Your people.

We’re a lively community of runners who believe the best runs are shared.

Based in Langport, we bring together complete beginners, weekend joggers, trail lovers and seasoned racers. No pressure, no ego — just good company, fresh air and a reason to lace up.

See how we run →

Find your stride

There’s a run
with your name on it.

Langport 10K Trail race

Our home race

Meet the
Portcullis 10K.

A brilliant multi-terrain race through the countryside surrounding Langport. Big local spirit, scenic miles and a finish worth chasing.

Explore the race ↗

change your week.
